violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. -No documentation of serve safe employee on staff.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside prep cooler.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Box of opened cup lids sitting on floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors need thorough cleaning including under equipment.
General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Back entry door has large gap on bottom.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Wet mop sitting on floor.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
